watchlist.name: Palantir Technologies
watchlist.notes: AI infrastructure play, wait for pullback

intelligence.content: Q4 FY2026 earnings beat expectations with $28.5B revenue (vs $26.8B est). Data center revenue up 93% YoY. Blackwell chip demand exceeding supply through mid-2026. Management guided Q1 revenue above consensus.

Morgan Stanley downgraded from Equal Weight to Underweight, citing stretched valuation at 45x forward revenue. Notes strong fundamentals but price already reflects multiple years of growth. Price target raised to $80 from $75.
